name: Ticket steepest Postbus ride Griesalp from Reichenbach return

longDescription: Discover Ticket steepest Postbus ride Griesalp from Reichenbach return in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Postbus
subcategory.description: Find your Postbus ticket here for a special journey through Switzerland. The yellow Postbuses travel over steep and narrow mountain roads as well as through densely populated areas. They are particularly well known for traveling to remote villages. This means that a Postbus ride is often very scenic. Postbus trips over the magnificent Swiss mountain passes are particularly popular. This even includes a 4-pass journey over the Grimsel, the Nufenen, the Gotthard and the Susten, covering more than 10,366 meters in altitude.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Kiental: A yellow bus drives along a waterfall in the beautiful nature of Switzerland.
Griesalp: A breathtaking landscape with a river, forest, and a yellow bus in the mountains.
Kiental: snow-covered mountains and a romantic view of the winter landscape with relaxing visitors.
Kiental-Griesalp: Skiing in the winter landscape with snowy mountains and hiking trails in Switzerland.
